mapper.select: select c.id, c.content_id as contentId, c.user_id as userId, c.parent_id as parentId, c.comment_text as commentText, c.create_time as createTime, u.username as username, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar as avatar from `comment` c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id where c.content_id = #{contentId} and c.status = 1 order by c.create_time asc
select id, content_id, user_id, parent_id, comment_text, status, create_time from `comment` where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into `comment` (content_id, user_id, parent_id, comment_text, status, create_time) values (#{contentId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{commentText}, #{status}, now())
